items.title_zh: 2024 诺贝尔化学奖得主詹珀离开谷歌 DeepMind，加入 Anthropic
items.title_en: Nobel Laureate John Jumper Leaves Google DeepMind for Anthropic
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，科技媒体 The Decoder 昨日（6 月 19 日）发布博文，报道称 2024 年诺贝尔化学奖得主、AlphaFold 团队负责人约翰 · 詹珀（John Jumper）在谷歌 DeepMind 工作近 9 年后离职，加入人工智能公司 Anthropic。 IT之家援引博文介绍，詹珀在谷歌 DeepMind 任职约 9 年时间，曾因开发 AlphaFold 系统与 CEO 德米斯 · 哈萨比斯（Demis Hassabis）共同获得 2024 年诺贝尔化学奖。AlphaFold 利用深度学习技术，提高蛋白质结构预测的准确率，被誉为“改变世界的成果”。 哈萨比斯表示：“感谢约翰在过去 9 年里给予我们的非凡合作和精彩协作”。 该媒体指出，谷歌 DeepMind 近期连续发生 3 起高管离职情况。谷歌 Gemini 模型联合负责人诺姆 · 沙泽尔（Noam Shazeer）加入 OpenAI，他是谷歌推理模型技术路线的核心推动者。 而更早之前，AlphaGo 与 AlphaZero 的领军人物大卫 · 西尔弗（David Silver）离开 DeepMind，创办专注于世界模型与强化学习的初创公司，并完成 10 亿美元种子轮融资。 约翰 · 詹珀（John Jumper），图源：WikiMedia
items.summary_en: John Jumper, 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry winner and AlphaFold lead, left Google DeepMind after nine years to join Anthropic. His departure follows a trend of senior exits from DeepMind, including Noam Shazeer to OpenAI and David Silver to a startup.
items.why_zh: 詹珀的离职标志着AI人才从大型科技公司向初创企业的持续流动，可能影响蛋白质预测等关键领域的竞争格局。
items.why_en: Jumper's move highlights the ongoing talent shift from big tech to AI startups, potentially reshaping competition in critical areas like protein prediction.

items.title_zh: OpenAI 最强 AI 模型：GPT-5.6 系列有望下周登场，生成 Win11 SVG 测试优于 Claude Mythos
items.title_en: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Series Expected Next Week, Outperforms Claude Mythos
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，科技媒体 testingcatalog 昨日（6 月 19 日）发布博文， 报道称 OpenAI 有望下周推出 GPT-5.6 系列模型，涵盖 mini、标准版以及 Pro 版。 部分 Pro 订阅网友在 X 平台发布推文，指出已支持访问 GPT-5.6 Pro 模型，首批输出的质量大幅提升。IT之家附上相关截图如下： 网友反馈在相同提示词下，完成某个项目耗时约 20~40 分钟，但是理解力显著增强，前端 / Web 开发问题虽未完全解决，认知深度已有进步。 性能方面，GPT-5.6 的上下文窗口从 100 万 tokens 扩展至 150 万 tokens，同时优化了长周期编码能力和 Codex 响应速度。消息称在智能体编码工作中，GPT-5.6 已优于 Anthropic 的 Mythos 系列，成为开发者眼中的新标杆。 定价方面，消息称 OpenAI 当前的 token 价格仅为 Anthropic 的一半左右，而 OpenAI 将直接发动价格战，在提升性能的前提下，进一步降价。
items.summary_en: OpenAI is reportedly launching GPT-5.6 series next week, with improved context window (1.5M tokens) and coding performance that surpasses Anthropic's Mythos. Pricing is half of Anthropic's, with further cuts expected.
items.why_zh: GPT-5.6的发布和降价策略可能加剧AI模型竞争，推动行业性能提升和成本下降。
items.why_en: The launch and price cuts of GPT-5.6 could intensify AI model competition, driving performance gains and cost reductions.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek 巨额融资落地，物理 AI、量子计算抢占风口 | 创投周报
items.title_en: DeepSeek Secures Massive Funding; Physical AI and Quantum Computing Gain Traction
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek 巨额融资落地，物理 AI、量子计算抢占风口 | 创投周报 新浪网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek has secured significant funding, while physical AI and quantum computing emerge as new investment hotspots in the AI venture capital landscape.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的融资和新兴技术方向表明AI投资正从纯软件向物理世界和量子计算扩展。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's funding and emerging tech trends indicate AI investment is expanding from pure software to physical and quantum domains.

items.title_zh: 洲际交易所加入Anthropic网络安全项目并推出ICE Compass
items.title_en: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Joins Anthropic Cyber Project And Launches ICE Compass
items.summary_zh: 洲际交易所（ICE）宣布加入Anthropic的网络安全项目，并推出新产品ICE Compass。此举表明传统金融机构正积极与AI公司合作，以增强网络安全能力。具体合作细节和ICE Compass功能未在摘要中详述。
items.summary_en: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Joins Anthropic Cyber Project And Launches ICE Compass Yahoo Finance
items.why_zh: ICE与Anthropic的合作凸显了AI在金融网络安全中的关键作用，可能推动更多机构采用AI安全解决方案。
items.why_en: ICE's partnership with Anthropic underscores AI's critical role in financial cybersecurity, potentially driving broader adoption of AI security solutions.

items.title_zh: 理想 i6 第 15 万辆量产车正式下线
items.title_en: Li Auto i6 Reaches 150,000 Units Produced
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，@理想汽车 今天（6 月 20 日）发布微博， 宣布理想 i6 第 15 万台量产车下线。 延伸阅读 理想 i6 是理想汽车旗下的一款纯电 SUV，于 2025 年 9 月 27 日开启交付，官方起售价为 24.98 万元。 该车拥有 3 米长轴距，配备前排 16.8 英寸 HUD、3K 双联屏以及后排 21.4 英寸 3K 大屏，并内置了理想同学 MindGPT 大模型。 在动力和续航方面，理想 i6 搭载全新 5C 磷酸铁锂电池，支持 5C 超级充电与放电，最大峰值功率超过 500kW，CLTC 工况标准续航为 720 公里。 根据理想汽车官方数据，理想 i6 在 2026 年 4 月 10 日达成第 10 万辆量产车下线，用时不到 7 个月。 此后，该车在 2026 年 6 月 10 日达成了第 14 万辆量产车下线，并已连续三个月交付量突破 2 万辆，位居纯电 SUV 销量前三。
items.summary_en: Li Auto's i6 EV SUV has reached 150,000 units produced. With a 720km range and MindGPT AI, it has been a top seller, achieving 100,000 units in under 7 months and maintaining over 20,000 monthly deliveries.
items.why_zh: 理想i6的快速量产里程碑展示了中国电动汽车市场的强劲需求和AI集成车型的竞争力。
items.why_en: The rapid production milestone of Li Auto i6 demonstrates strong demand and competitiveness of AI-integrated EVs in China.

items.title_zh: IPO研究｜预计2030年中国企业级大模型市场规模将增至3254亿元
items.title_en: China Enterprise LLM Market Projected to Reach 325.4 Billion Yuan by 2030
items.summary_zh: IPO研究｜预计2030年中国企业级大模型市场规模将增至3254亿元 新浪网
items.summary_en: China's enterprise-level large language model market is expected to grow to 325.4 billion yuan by 2030, indicating rapid adoption of AI in business.
items.why_zh: 该预测凸显了中国企业级AI市场的巨大潜力，大模型将成为企业数字化转型的关键驱动力。
items.why_en: The projection highlights the immense potential of China's enterprise AI market, with LLMs driving digital transformation.

items.title_zh: 小米平板 9 标准版曝光：高通骁龙 8s Gen4 芯片，9720mAh 电池
items.title_en: Xiaomi Pad 9 Standard Edition Leaks: Snapdragon 8s Gen4, 9720mAh Battery
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，科技媒体 ximitime 昨日（6 月 19 日）发布博文，报道称小米平板 9 预估将推出标准和 Pro 两个版本，其代码显示小米平板 9 标准版可能复用小米平板 8 的相关硬件和固件平台。 根据泄露的代码信息，小米平板 9 标准版预估型号为 M656BA，开发者 Kacper 发现该平板和小米平板 8 共享硬件平台，使用高度相关的固件包。因此该媒体推测小米平板 9 可能会复用小米平板 8 硬件，从而加速 HyperOS 更新。IT之家附上相关截图如下： 在内部代号方面，报道称小米平板 9 标准版的内部代号为“donghai”（东海），而 Pro 版本代号为“shuntian”（预估为顺天，在神话中顺天圣母相传为观世音菩萨的化身）。 此外标准版的“donghai”还关联“yupei_d”代号 ，而小米平板 8 的内部代号就是“yupei”，进一步表明两款平板共享开发基础和固件。 电池方面，消息称小米平板 9 标准版可能会采用 9720mAh 容量电池， 要比小米平板 8 标准版（9200mAh）多 520mAh，增幅 5.65%。 配置方面，标准版小米平板 9 预计将采用小米平板 8 同款芯片，为高通骁龙 8s Gen 4 芯片。而 Pro 版则可能升级到高通第五代骁龙 8 芯片。发布日期方面，小米有望 2026 年 8 月发布小米平板 9 系列。
items.summary_en: Xiaomi Pad 9 standard edition leaks reveal Snapdragon 8s Gen4, 9720mAh battery, and shared hardware platform with Pad 8 for faster updates. Expected launch in August 2026.
items.why_zh: 小米平板9的硬件复用策略可能加速系统更新，同时提升电池容量，增强市场竞争力。
items.why_en: Xiaomi's hardware reuse strategy could speed up updates and improve battery life, boosting competitiveness.

items.title_zh: AI与系统工程十年回顾与展望：从基础到LLM转折点
items.title_en: AI4SE and SE4AI Exploration: A Decade Looking Back and Forward
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文回顾了AI与系统工程（SE）在过去十年的发展，分为三个阶段：基础、应用和LLM转折点。2020年INCOSE INSIGHT特刊成为该期刊下载量最高的期号，并催生了每年超过250人注册的研究社区。文章总结了社区共识和关键差距，并探讨了人机一致性问题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19630v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The March 2020 INCOSE INSIGHT special issue on AI and Systems Engineering (SE) became the most downloaded issue in the publication's history and launched a research community that now draws over 250 registrants to its annual workshop. In this article, we trace the progress in AI and SE across three phases (labeled here foundational, applied, and LLM inflection) based on the authors' reading of the field's core papers, and describe our opinions of where the community has converged and where critical gaps remain. Separately, a human-AI agreement li…
items.why_zh: 该综述为AI与系统工程交叉领域提供了重要历史视角和未来方向，有助于指导研究和应用。
items.why_en: This review provides a crucial historical perspective and future directions for AI and systems engineering, guiding research and applications.

items.title_zh: 智能评审系统基准测试
items.title_en: Benchmarking Agentic Review Systems
items.summary_zh: 一篇新论文指出，AI辅助研究给同行评审系统带来压力，催生了新型智能评审系统，但如何评估这些系统尚不明确。研究者评估了两个开源系统（OpenAIReview和coarse）、一个专有系统（Reviewer3）以及一个零样本基线，涉及六种前沿和高效的大语言模型。他们研究了AI评审是否与论文质量（以引用和录用决定等外部信号衡量）相关。结果显示，所有系统表现均不理想，表明当前AI评审系统尚不能可靠替代人工评审。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19749v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A new class of agentic review systems are emerging as a remedy to the pressure placed on peer review systems by AI-assisted research, but it is unclear how they should be evaluated. We evaluate two open-source systems (OpenAIReview and coarse), one proprietary system (Reviewer3), and a zero-shot baseline, across six LLMs spanning frontier and efficient models. First, we study whether AI reviews on ICLR/NeurIPS papers track with papers' quality as approximated by external signals such as citations and acceptance decisions. Every system performs ab…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了当前AI评审系统的局限性，对学术出版中AI的应用具有重要警示意义。
items.why_en: This study reveals the limitations of current AI review systems, serving as a caution for AI adoption in academic publishing.

items.title_zh: Multi-LCB：将LiveCodeBench扩展到多种编程语言
items.title_en: Multi-LCB: Extending LiveCodeBench to Multiple Programming Languages
items.summary_zh: LiveCodeBench（LCB）已成为评估大语言模型代码生成能力的常用基准，但仅限于Python。本文提出Multi-LCB，将LCB扩展到多种编程语言，以检验LLM在真实软件工程所需的多语言环境中的泛化能力。通过收集多语言竞赛编程问题并持续更新，Multi-LCB提供了抗污染评估，有助于全面了解LLM的编码能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20517v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LiveCodeBench (LCB) has recently become a widely adopted benchmark for evaluating large language models (LLMs) on code-generation tasks. By curating competitive programming problems, constantly adding fresh problems to the set, and filtering them by release dates, LCB provides contamination-aware evaluation and offers a holistic view of coding capability. However, LCB remains restricted to Python, leaving open the question of whether LLMs can generalize across the diverse programming languages required in real-world software engineering. We intro…
items.why_zh: 该工作填补了LLM多语言代码评估的空白，对实际软件工程应用至关重要。
items.why_en: This work fills a gap in multi-language code evaluation for LLMs, crucial for real-world software engineering.

items.title_zh: 查询位置如何影响扩散LLM的上下文学习？——位置偏差的揭示与缓解
items.title_en: Where to Place the Query? Unveiling and Mitigating Positional Bias in In-Context Learning for Diffusion LLMs via Decoding Dynamics
items.summary_zh: 扩散大语言模型（dLLM）采用双向注意力机制，理论上允许查询灵活放置，但当前实践仍沿用自回归模型的尾部查询模板。本文系统分析了查询位置对dLLM上下文学习的影响，揭示了位置偏差的存在，并基于解码动态提出缓解方法。研究表明，合理选择查询位置能显著提升dLLM的上下文学习性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19349v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While In-Context Learning (ICL) is extensively studied in Autoregressive (AR) LLMs, its mechanism within Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) remains largely unexplored. Unlike AR models restricted by unidirectional causal masking, dLLMs intrinsically utilize bidirectional attention, offering extensive spatial flexibility for query placement. Unfortunately, current practices conventionally inherit AR-style trailing-query templates, often overlooking the structural paradigm shift. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis unveiling that qu…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次系统分析扩散LLM中查询位置的影响，为优化其上下文学习提供了新思路。
items.why_en: This is the first systematic analysis of query placement in diffusion LLMs, offering new insights for optimizing in-context learning.

items.title_zh: 具身智能体的玩耍式学习
items.title_en: Playful Agentic Robot Learning
items.summary_zh: 当前具身智能体系统能编写可执行代码、观察反馈并修正行为，但技能获取仍依赖明确指令。本文提出“玩耍式智能体机器人学习”，让具身编码智能体通过自主玩耍持续学习技能，为下游任务做准备。作者引入RATs（机器人智能体团队），在玩耍阶段自主提出新颖且可学习的探索任务，从而积累可复用技能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19419v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Current agentic robot systems can write executable Code-as-Policy programs, observe feedback, and revise behavior across multiple attempts, but they remain largely task-driven: reusable skills are acquired only after explicit instructions. We study Playful Agentic Robot Learning, where an embodied coding agent uses self-directed play as a continual skill-learning stage before downstream tasks arrive. We introduce RATs, Robotics Agent Teams designed for play-time skill acquisition. During play, RATs proposes novel yet learnable exploratory tasks…
items.why_zh: 该方法使机器人能像人类一样通过玩耍自主学习，有望大幅提升机器人技能的泛化性和适应性。
items.why_en: This approach enables robots to learn autonomously through play, potentially improving skill generalization and adaptability.

items.title_zh: 十亿参数级胸部X光片生成基础模型
items.title_en: Scaling Generative Foundation Models for Chest Radiography with Rectified Flow Transformers
items.summary_zh: 现有胸部X光AI模型在不同患者群体、机构和采集设置下泛化能力差，限制了临床实用性。本文首次提出十亿参数级的胸部X光片生成基础模型，使用整流流变换器从头训练。该模型能生成高保真、可控的胸部X光片，有望用于扩充临床数据集和评估诊断模型的鲁棒性。这是目前最大的专用生成式基础模型。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19460v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce the first generative foundation model for chest radiograph synthesis trained from scratch at the billion-parameter scale. Existing radiographic AI models often suffer from poor generalisation across patient subpopulations, institutions, and acquisition settings, resulting in limited real-world clinical utility. Controlled, high-fidelity synthesis of chest radiographs is a promising path toward diversifying clinical datasets and evaluating the robustness of diagnostic models. Therefore, we present the largest specialist generative f…
items.why_zh: 该模型为医学影像领域提供了首个大规模生成式基础模型，有望改善AI在放射学中的泛化性和实用性。
items.why_en: This is the first large-scale generative foundation model for medical imaging, potentially improving AI generalization and utility in radiology.

items.title_zh: 边缘设备上LLM LoRA微调的峰值内存缩减技术
items.title_en: Techniques for Peak Memory Reduction for LoRA Fine-tuning of LLMs on Edge Devices
items.summary_zh: 在消费级硬件上使用LoRA微调大语言模型面临严重的内存限制，尤其是数十亿参数模型和长上下文训练数据。本文提出一套互补技术来降低内存占用而不牺牲模型质量：包括基础模型量化与即时反量化、内存高效的优化器状态管理、以及梯度检查点等。这些技术使在边缘设备上微调大模型成为可能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19528v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Fine-tuning of Large Language Models (LLMs) using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on an end-user's data offers personalized experiences while keeping data private, but faces severe memory constraints on consumer hardware. Peak memory during fine-tuning often exceeds device limits, especially for models with billions of parameters and long-context training data. This paper introduces a suite of complementary techniques to reduce memory footprint without sacrificing model quality: (1) base model quantization with on-the-fly dequantization, (2) memory-…
items.why_zh: 该工作使在资源受限设备上微调大模型成为可能，对隐私保护和个性化部署具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work enables fine-tuning large models on resource-constrained devices, crucial for privacy-preserving and personalized deployment.

items.title_zh: PerceptionDLM：基于多模态扩散语言模型的并行区域感知
items.title_en: PerceptionDLM: Parallel Region Perception with Multimodal Diffusion Language Models
items.summary_zh: 现有大多数多模态大语言模型依赖自回归生成，限制了需要描述多个区域的感知任务的效率。本文提出PerceptionDLM，一种针对高效并行区域感知优化的多模态扩散语言模型。基于强基线PerceptionDLM-Base（在开源扩散MLLM中达到最先进性能），该架构实现了多个区域的并行描述生成，显著提升了感知任务的效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19534v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in visual understanding tasks. However, most existing MLLMs rely on autoregressive generation, which limits their efficiency for perception tasks that require captioning multiple regions. In this work, we propose PerceptionDLM, a multimodal diffusion language model optimized for efficient parallel region perception. Built upon PerceptionDLM-Base, a strong foundational baseline that achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source diffusion MLLMs, our architecture…
items.why_zh: 该模型突破了自回归生成在区域感知任务中的效率瓶颈，为高效多模态理解提供了新范式。
items.why_en: This model breaks the efficiency bottleneck of autoregressive generation in region perception, offering a new paradigm for efficient multimodal understanding.

items.title_zh: 基于梯度差异的图遗忘学习用于电动汽车充电网络网络攻击定位
items.title_en: GDGU: A Gradient Difference-based Graph Unlearning Method for Cyberattack Localization in Electric Vehicle Charging Networks
items.summary_zh: 电动汽车充电站可能使配电网暴露于网络攻击。机器学习方法（如图神经网络）可定位受攻击的母线，但面临数据共享和模型训练挑战。例如，隐私法规允许充电站所有者要求删除其训练数据，但每次请求都从头重新训练计算成本过高。本文提出基于梯度差异的图遗忘学习（GDGU），用于电动汽车充电网络攻击定位，实现了高效的数据删除和模型更新。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19566v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Electric vehicle charging stations (EVCSs) can expose distribution feeders to cyberattacks. While machine learning methods, including graph neural networks, can localize which bus is compromised, significant challenges remain in data sharing and model training. For example, privacy regulations grant EVCS owners the right to delete their training data from a deployed model, yet retraining from scratch on every request is computationally prohibitive. To address this, we study graph unlearning (GU) for EVCS cyberattack localization, formulated as…
items.why_zh: 该工作解决了隐私法规下的模型更新难题，对保障电动汽车充电网络安全和用户隐私具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work addresses model updating under privacy regulations, crucial for securing EV charging networks and user privacy.

items.title_zh: LLM生成单元测试的库感知双精度与迭代修复方法
items.title_en: Library-Aware Doubles and Iterative Repair for Large Language Model-Generated Unit Tests in OpenSIL Firmware
items.summary_zh: 该研究针对低级C固件验证成本高的问题，提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的自动化单元测试生成工作流，应用于AMD维护的开源硅初始化库（openSIL）。由于严格的构建约束（如缺失头文件、未解析符号和依赖不匹配），传统单元测试脆弱且常导致编译和链接失败。新工作流采用LLM引导的多智能体流水线，结合自动化生成与迭代修复技术，显著减少人工干预。该方法有望提高固件开发效率，降低测试维护成本。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19725v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Validating changes in low-level C firmware is expensive because unit tests (UTs) are fragile under strict build constraints, where missing headers, unresolved symbols, and dependency mismatches frequently prevent compilation and linking. This study introduces an automated UT authoring workflow for the Open-Source Silicon Initialization Library (openSIL) firmware codebase maintained by Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) that reduces manual effort through a large language model (LLM) guided multi-agent pipeline. The workflow combines automated generati…
items.why_zh: 该研究为低层固件测试自动化提供了新思路，有望大幅降低验证成本并提升开发效率。
items.why_en: This research offers a novel approach to automating low-level firmware testing, potentially reducing validation costs and improving development efficiency.

items.title_zh: SARLO-80：全球80厘米斜视SAR语言光学数据集
items.title_en: SARLO-80: Worldwide Slant SAR Language Optic Dataset 80cm
items.summary_zh: 多模态基础模型因大规模光学基准而快速发展，但合成孔径雷达（SAR）领域缺乏类似资源。现有SAR-光学数据集多依赖低分辨率、仅强度的地面距离探测（GRD）产品，未保留复值SAR测量或原生采集几何，限制了物理基础的多模态学习。该研究提出了SARLO-80数据集，结合甚高分辨率（VHR）SAR单视复数（SLC）图像、对齐的光学图像和自然语言描述，填补了该领域空白。数据集覆盖全球范围，分辨率为80厘米，为SAR-光学多模态学习提供了重要资源。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20523v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multimodal foundation models have advanced rapidly thanks to large optical benchmarks, but comparable resources for synthetic aperture radar (SAR) remain limited. Existing SAR--optical datasets largely rely on low-resolution, intensity-only Ground Range Detected~(GRD) products and do not preserve complex-valued SAR measurements or native acquisition geometry, which restricts physically grounded multimodal learning. In particular, large-scale public datasets combining very-high-resolution (VHR) SAR SLC, aligned optical imagery, and natural-langu…
items.why_zh: 该数据集填补了高分辨率SAR-光学多模态学习的资源空白，对遥感基础模型发展具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This dataset fills a critical gap in high-resolution SAR-optical multimodal learning, advancing foundation models for remote sensing.

items.title_zh: 受监管社交媒体平台上的语言演化模拟：LLM与遗传算法的协同方法
items.title_en: Simulation of Language Evolution under Regulated Social Media Platforms: A Synergistic Approach of Large Language Models and Genetic Algorithms
items.summary_zh: 社交媒体平台常实施限制性政策以审核用户内容，促使用户创造规避性语言策略。该论文提出一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的多智能体框架，模拟在监管约束下语言策略的迭代演化。框架中，参与者智能体作为社交媒体用户不断演化语言表达，而监管智能体模拟平台级审核，评估政策违规。通过结合遗传算法，框架实现了语言策略的进化优化。该研究有助于理解监管与用户行为之间的动态博弈，为平台政策设计提供参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2502.19193v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Social media platforms frequently impose restrictive policies to moderate user content, prompting the emergence of creative evasion language strategies. This paper presents a multi-agent framework based on Large Language Models (LLMs) to simulate the iterative evolution of language strategies under regulatory constraints. In this framework, participant agents, as social media users, continuously evolve their language expression, while supervisory agents emulate platform-level regulation by assessing policy violations. To achieve a more…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了监管与用户语言策略的协同演化机制，对理解社交媒体内容治理具有重要价值。
items.why_en: This work illuminates the co-evolution of regulation and user language strategies, offering insights for social media content governance.

items.title_zh: LoRDO：低通信频率的分布式低秩优化
items.title_en: LoRDO: Distributed Low-Rank Optimization with Infrequent Communication
items.summary_zh: 通过DDP进行基础模型分布式训练受限于互连带宽。低频通信策略虽减少同步频率，但优化器状态的内存和通信需求仍构成瓶颈。低秩优化器可缓解这些限制，但在局部更新模式下，工作节点无法访问计算低秩投影所需的全批量梯度，导致性能下降。该研究提出LoRDO框架，统一了低秩优化与分布式训练，通过原则性方法实现低通信频率下的高效训练。实验表明，LoRDO在保持模型质量的同时显著降低了通信开销。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.04396v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Distributed training of foundation models via $\texttt{DDP}$ is limited by interconnect bandwidth. While infrequent communication strategies reduce synchronization frequency, they remain bottlenecked by the memory and communication requirements of optimizer states. Low-rank optimizers can alleviate these constraints; however, in the local-update regime, workers lack access to the full-batch gradients required to compute low-rank projections, which degrades performance. We propose $\texttt{LoRDO}$, a principled framework unifying low-ran…
items.why_zh: LoRDO为大规模分布式训练提供了通信高效的优化方案，对降低基础模型训练成本具有实际意义。
items.why_en: LoRDO provides a communication-efficient optimization method for large-scale distributed training, reducing costs for foundation models.

items.title_zh: 闪烁多臂老虎机：动作可用性动态变化的决策模型
items.title_en: Flickering Multi-Armed Bandits
items.summary_zh: 该研究提出闪烁多臂老虎机（FMAB）模型，用于建模动作可用性动态变化环境中的序贯决策。在该模型中，下一动作的可用性受限于当前动作所决定的子集，形式化为随机演化图，动作仅限于局部邻域。这种移动性约束带来了双重挑战：信息获取的统计需求与导航的物理开销。研究分析了FMAB在多种设置下的性能，并提出了相应的算法。该模型适用于推荐系统、机器人导航等场景，其中可用选项随上下文动态变化。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.17315v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce Flickering Multi-Armed Bandits (FMAB) to model sequential decision-making in environments with changing action availability, where accessibility of the next action is restricted to a subset dependent on the agent's current choice. We formalize these constraints through stochastically evolving graphs where actions are limited to local neighborhoods. This mobility-constrained structure imposes a dual challenge: the statistical requirement of information acquisition and the physical overhead of navigation. We analyze FMAB unde…
items.why_zh: 该模型为动态环境下的决策问题提供了新理论框架，对推荐系统和机器人等领域具有指导意义。
items.why_en: This model provides a novel theoretical framework for decision-making in dynamic environments, with implications for recommendation systems and robotics.

items.title_zh: 存在约 1 年时间：微软修复 Win11 JScript 兼容问题
items.title_en: Microsoft Fixes Win11 JScript Compatibility Issue After Nearly a Year
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，微软于 6 月 18 日更新官方支持文档， 承认在 Windows 11 系统中存在 JScript 兼容性问题，已存在将近 1 年时间。 微软于 2025 年 7 月为提高 Windows 11 系统的安全性，将默认脚本引擎从 jscript9.dll 切换为 jscript9legacy.dll ，而在 2025 年 10 月发布的 25H2 中， 默认启用 JScript9Legacy，导致系统始终存在兼容性问题。 新引擎减少跨站脚本漏洞，但改变了 JScript 组件的执行上下文处理方式，导致在不同脚本间无法持久保留全局定义和状态（旧版引擎自动保留全局定义），进而导致应用运行错误或页面加载失败。 微软在 2 月 24 日发布的 KB5077241 更新中修复该问题，但默认状态下并未启用，管理员通过注册表键 FEATURE_ENABLE_PERSISTENCE 路径下手动启用持久性。 IT之家援引博文介绍，用户需要打开注册表，前往以下路径： HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\Main\FeatureControl\FEATURE_ENABLE_PERSISTENCE 然后用户创建一个新的 DWORD（32 位）值“*”，随后将其设置为数值“1”。
items.summary_en: Microsoft acknowledged a JScript compatibility issue in Windows 11 that existed for nearly a year. The issue arose from switching the default script engine to JScript9Legacy, which changed context handling and broke persistence. A fix was released in KB5077241 but requires manual registry activation.
items.why_zh: 该问题影响Windows 11用户近一年，修复需手动操作，对系统兼容性和用户体验有重要影响。
items.why_en: This issue affected Windows 11 users for nearly a year, and the fix requires manual intervention, impacting system compatibility and user experience.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek上线识图模式，看谁都像梁文锋
items.title_en: DeepSeek Launches Image Recognition Mode, Sparking Discussion on Bias
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek上线识图模式，看谁都像梁文锋 新浪财经
items.summary_en: DeepSeek's new image recognition mode reportedly misidentifies various individuals as the same person, raising concerns about AI bias and accuracy. The company has not yet commented.
items.why_zh: 该事件揭示了AI视觉识别中的偏差问题，对模型可靠性和用户信任构成挑战。
items.why_en: This incident highlights bias in AI visual recognition, challenging model reliability and user trust.

items.title_zh: 超级珊瑚礁被发现：水温高出 2°C 仍生机盎然
items.title_en: Super Reefs Discovered: Heat-Tolerant Corals Studied with AI
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，科技媒体 Ars Technica 昨日（6 月 19 日）发布博文，报道称在全球海洋热浪导致 80% 以上珊瑚白化背景下， 科研团队发现一片生机勃勃的珊瑚礁，将其命名为“超级珊瑚礁”（super reefs）。 报道称自 2023 年以来，创纪录的海洋热浪席卷热带海域， 导致全球超过 80% 的珊瑚礁发生白化 。珊瑚因高温排出体内共生的虫黄藻，变白后生存艰难。 来自伍兹霍尔海洋研究所的海洋学家安妮 · 科恩（Anne Cohen）在马绍尔群岛马朱罗环礁发现一片色彩斑斓、繁茂生长的珊瑚礁，仿佛从未受热浪影响，随后团队将其命名为“超级珊瑚礁”。 IT之家援引博文介绍，科恩自 2018 年启动“超级珊瑚礁”项目，联合大自然保护协会和斯坦福大学，在伯利兹、夏威夷和马绍尔群岛深入研究耐热珊瑚。在马朱罗的劳拉地区， 模型预测水温比其他区域高近 2°C，实地实验证实当地珊瑚耐热性最强。 科恩团队为了提高科研效率，调用无人船“黄鳍”，该机器人搭载 GoPro 相机，单日可扫描 40 英里礁石并拍摄 2 万张图像，远超 100 名潜水员数周的工作量。 团队随后这些图像训练 AI 模型自动识别白化与恢复状况，并构建三维模型分析珊瑚的位置、角度如何影响其热暴露。2024 年拍摄的照片显示，同一区域同种珊瑚出现一死一活的对比，揭示了耐热性背后复杂的遗传与环境因素。 科恩的…
items.summary_en: Researchers discovered heat-tolerant 'super reefs' in the Marshall Islands, thriving in waters 2°C warmer. Using an autonomous vessel and AI, they analyzed coral resilience, revealing complex genetic and environmental factors behind heat tolerance.
items.why_zh: 该发现为珊瑚礁在气候变暖下的生存提供了希望，AI技术的应用加速了研究进程。
items.why_en: This discovery offers hope for coral reef survival under climate warming, with AI accelerating research into heat tolerance.

items.title_zh: 豪掷200亿元，梁文锋为何敢向资本开出“霸王条款”？
items.title_en: Liang Wenfeng Spends 20 Billion Yuan, Imposes 'Take-It-or-Leave-It' Terms on Investors
items.summary_zh: 豪掷200亿元，梁文锋为何敢向资本开出“霸王条款”？ 新浪网
items.summary_en: Liang Wenfeng, founder of DeepSeek, reportedly spent 20 billion yuan and imposed stringent terms on investors. The move highlights the shifting power dynamics in AI fundraising.
items.why_zh: 该事件凸显了AI头部企业在融资中的强势地位，可能改变行业投融资格局。
items.why_en: This event highlights the strong bargaining power of leading AI companies, potentially reshaping investment dynamics.

items.title_zh: Anthropic 恰乌里称有信心“未来几天”重新开放 Mythos 及 Fable 5 AI 模型
items.title_en: Anthropic Confident to Reopen Mythos and Fable 5 Models 'Within Days'
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，韩国中央日报于 6 月 19 日发布博文，报道称在韩国首尔举办的新闻发布会上，Anthropic 国际董事总经理克里斯 · 恰乌里（Chris Ciauri）表示， 公司有信心“未来几天内”向美国之外地区重新开放 Claude Mythos 以及 Claude Fable 5 模型。 IT之家此前报道，由于美国白宫安全指令，Anthropic 临时封锁了其前沿模型 Mythos 和 Fable 5 的访问权限。恰乌里在首尔新闻发布会上表示，有信心在“未来几天内”重新开放。 恰乌里表示 Anthropic 将深化对韩投资，已开始组建团队，涵盖商业、技术、政策和运营人员，并计划在未来数月快速扩展。韩国在 Anthropic 全球使用量中排名第 12 位，被视作增长最快市场之一。 Project Glasswing 是 Anthropoic 为应对 Mythos 潜在风险而启动的网络安全倡议，仅向特定实体开放该模型。目前该计划约有 150 个合作伙伴，包括谷歌、英伟达、微软、苹果、三星电子、SK 海力士和 SK Telecom。 相关阅读： 《 因美国政府政策限制，Anthropic 暂停供应 Mythos 5/Fable 5 模型 》 《 最强 Claude 模型：Anthropic 推出 Fable 5/Mythos 5，书写 AI 神话 》
items.summary_en: Anthropic's Chris Ciauri stated confidence in reopening Claude Mythos and Fable 5 models outside the US within days, after a US security directive caused a temporary block. The company also plans to expand in South Korea and disclosed Project Glasswing partners including Google, Nvidia, and Microsoft.
items.why_zh: Anthropic前沿模型的重新开放将影响全球AI模型可用性，并反映美国AI安全政策对国际市场的限制与调整。
items.why_en: The reopening of Anthropic's frontier models affects global AI accessibility and reflects US AI safety policy impacts on international markets.

items.title_zh: Steam Deck 掌机推送客户端 Beta 通道更新：修复好友聊天、控制器输入多项问题
items.title_en: Steam Deck Beta Update Fixes Friend Chat and Controller Input Issues
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，V社近日向 Steam Deck 掌机推送客户端 Beta 测试通道更新，本次更新主要修复好友聊天与 Steam 输入功能存在的多个问题，本次更新目前仅面向预览 / Beta 测试通道用户推送，稳定版用户还需等待后续版本整合上线。 好友聊天 修复了在好友邀请列表点击“全部忽略”后，手柄导航可能无响应的问题 Steam 输入 修复了删除一个动作集后，导致配置文件加载失败的问题 修复了添加动作集对话框的下拉菜单中有时出现空白条目的问题 本文由机器人发布，如果你发现了日志中未提及的更新点，欢迎发在评论区供大家参考 ~[微笑]
items.summary_en: Valve has released a Beta update for Steam Deck that fixes several issues in friend chat and Steam Input, including controller navigation unresponsiveness and profile loading failures. The update is currently available only to preview/beta testers.
items.why_zh: 修复关键交互问题，提升Steam Deck用户体验。
items.why_en: Fixes critical interaction issues, improving Steam Deck user experience.

items.title_zh: visionOS 27 今秋推送：M5 Vision Pro 头显独占 Siri 语音定制和苹果最强本地 AI 模型
items.title_en: visionOS 27 This Fall: M5 Vision Pro Exclusive Siri Voice Customization and Most Powerful On-Device AI Model
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，科技媒体 9to5Mac 昨日（6 月 19 日）发布博文，报道称在 visionOS 27 系统中， 苹果为 M5 Vision Pro 头显独占推出 Siri 语音定制（Voice Customization）和本地 AI 模型 AFM 3 Core Advanced。 该媒体指出 M2 款 Vision Pro 和 M5 款 Vision Pro 共享 visionOS 27 诸多功能升级，涵盖 Siri AI、全景照片转空间场景、重新设计的控制中心、更智能的自然语言理解，以及更强悍的语音操作交互等。 IT之家援引博文介绍，M5 款 Vision Pro 头显独占 2 项功能，其一是 Siri AI 的语音定制（Voice Customization）功能，用户可自由调整 Siri 语气的表现力和语速，实现个性化交互。 其二是 AFM 3 Core Advanced 模型 （支持原生多模态能力，并采用稀疏架构，可以在本地承载和实现更复杂的 AI 功能），由于在处理复杂任务时，Apple Intelligence 会更频繁地协调调用本地增强模型，需要 M5 芯片的更强算力支撑。 M2 用户仍可享受 visionOS 27 绝大多数视觉和交互升级，包括新的空间环境、改进的窗口管理、多任务优化等。苹果承诺未来会通过云端计算为 M2 设备提供部分 AI…
items.summary_en: Apple's visionOS 27 this fall will bring exclusive features to M5 Vision Pro: Siri Voice Customization and the on-device AI model AFM 3 Core Advanced. M2 Vision Pro users will still get most visual and interaction upgrades, with some AI features possibly coming via cloud computing.
items.why_zh: M5 Vision Pro独占功能凸显苹果在本地AI和个性化交互上的布局。
items.why_en: M5 Vision Pro exclusive features highlight Apple's push in on-device AI and personalized interaction.

items.title_zh: 受内存价格持续飙升影响，Nothing 宣布今年停更 CMF 系列手机
items.title_en: Soaring Memory Prices Force Nothing to Halt CMF Phone Line This Year
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，Nothing 联合创始人 Akis Evangelidis 在 X 平台确认，受内存价格持续飙升影响，Nothing 旗下子品牌 CMF by Nothing 原定的 CMF Phone 2 Pro 迭代机型发布计划被迫取消，公司今年不会推出新的 CMF 手机。 IT之家注意到，Nothing CEO 裴宇上周 也发文透露 ，公司旗下中端机 Nothing Phone (4a) 的成本正在迅速上涨。他透露，在产品立项到正式上市期间，内存成本翻了一倍；而上市之后到现在，价格又再次翻倍。目前“内存已经成为智能手机里最贵的零部件”。 业内普遍认为，这一轮内存涨价主要与 AI 服务器需求暴涨有关。随着英伟达等厂商大量采购高带宽内存（HBM）和 DRAM，整体存储供应链变得更加紧张，连带消费电子市场也受到挤压。对于在海外主打“性价比定价”的 CMF 来说，这种冲击尤其明显，一旦核心元件成本暴涨，很难通过涨价完全转嫁给消费者。 不过，Akis Evangelidis 也强调，虽然今年不会有新的 CMF 手机，但 CMF 仍有多个新品正在准备中，甚至还会进入一些“全新品类”，同时他还暗示公司主品牌 Nothing 仍然会推出新款手机。 ▲ CMF Phone 2 Pro
items.summary_en: Nothing co-founder Akis Evangelidis confirmed that due to soaring memory prices, the CMF Phone 2 Pro has been canceled and no new CMF phones will launch this year. CEO Carl Pei noted memory costs doubled during development and again after launch, making it the most expensive smartphone component. The price surge is linked to AI server demand for HBM and DRAM, squeezing consumer electronics. CMF will still release other new products and enter new categories.
items.why_zh: 内存涨价由 AI 服务器需求驱动，凸显 AI 对消费电子供应链的深远影响。
items.why_en: Memory price hikes driven by AI server demand highlight AI's profound impact on consumer electronics supply chains.

items.title_zh: 法国总统敦促美国共享尖端 AI，呼吁民主国家合作监管

items.title_zh: 美国政府封禁Anthropic模型，反助品牌知名度？
items.title_en: Is the US government’s Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?
items.summary_zh: 上周，美国政府以国家安全为由，强制Anthropic撤回其最新模型Fable 5和Mythos 5，起因是亚马逊研究人员声称找到了绕过Fable 5安全护栏的方法。此后，网络安全研究人员签署公开信，称此举危险，而Anthropic也指出其他模型存在同样的越狱漏洞。这一禁令反而引发了公众对Anthropic品牌的关注，可能意外提升了其知名度。
items.summary_en: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5’s guardrails.  Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models. So is […]
items.why_zh: 该事件凸显了AI安全监管与品牌效应之间的复杂关系，可能影响未来AI模型的发布策略。
items.why_en: This incident highlights the complex relationship between AI safety regulation and brand impact, potentially influencing future AI model release strategies.

items.summary_en: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5’s guardrails.  Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models. So is […]

items.title_zh: 印度首富安巴尼：印度必须成为 AI 的创造者和全球领导者
items.title_en: Billionaire Ambani: India must become AI creator and global leader
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 19 日消息，印度首富、信实工业集团董事长穆克什 · 安巴尼希望，把公司打造为当地 AI 产业的代表，并把 AI 服务带入 电话、移动应用和智能家居 。 当地时间 19 日（今天），信实工业举行了年度股东大会，并发布 AI 通话助手 Jio Call Agent。Jio Call Agent 可以加入电话通话， 自动转录对话、生成摘要 ，还能帮助用户 叫车、点餐和预订服务 。用户只需说出“Hey Jio”即可启动。Jio Call Agent 预计今年晚些时候上线，覆盖旗下 超过 5 亿用户 。 与独立 AI 应用不同，Jio Call Agent 将 直接嵌入 Jio 电信网络 。Jio 希望 AI 助手成为电话通话的原生功能，从而减少用户对第三方通话助手的依赖，并借助庞大的电信用户基础，在竞争日益激烈的 AI 市场中获得分发优势。 信实工业还推出 AI 版 MyJio。用户可以 直接用自然语言下达指令 ，让 MyJio 完成开通 eSIM、选择漫游套餐等操作。另一款新品 TeleFrame 面向智能家居，可以利用 AI 智能体主动显示天气预警、日程和家庭提醒。亚马逊和谷歌也在探索类似的家庭环境智能助手，TeleFrame 反映出整个行业正在向这一方向发展。 信实去年成立了 Reliance Intelligence，计划为消费者、企业和政府开发 AI 基础设施…
items.summary_en: Indian billionaire Mukesh Ambani announced at Reliance Industries' annual general meeting the launch of Jio Call Agent, an AI assistant that can join phone calls, transcribe conversations, and help with services like ride-hailing and food ordering. The company also introduced AI-powered MyJio and TeleFrame for smart homes. Ambani emphasized that India must become a creator and global leader in AI.
items.why_zh: 安巴尼的AI布局将借助信实庞大的电信用户基础，可能加速AI在印度的大规模普及。
items.why_en: Ambani's AI push leverages Reliance's massive telecom user base, potentially accelerating AI adoption across India.

items.title_zh: 应对 AI 耗电激增，美国要求 6 家电网运营商加速给数据中心供电
items.title_en: US orders 6 grid operators to speed up power supply for data centers amid AI energy surge
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 19 日消息，据美联社报道，当地时间周四，美国联邦能源监管委员会下令，要求 6 家区域电网运营商加快 大型用电设施接入美国老化且效率低下的输电系统 。委员会表示，AI 数据中心耗电量巨大，用电需求又在迅速增长，美国必须加快并网流程。 美国能源部长克里斯 · 赖特此前敦促委员会采取行动，希望增强美国在 AI 领域与中国竞争的能力。 科技公司和数据中心开发商欢迎新命令。新一代大型数据中心已成为 美国有史以来耗电规模最大的设施 ，其中一些数据中心的耗电量甚至 超过一座小城市 。 委员会采取行动之际，美国社会对数据中心的反对情绪正在升温。争议主要集中在数据中心消耗大量电力和水资源，也可能带来噪声、空气污染、缺水，并占用农田或其他开放空间。 IT之家从报道中获悉，该委员会成员一致通过新命令，要求 6 家区域电网运营商确保 AI 数据中心和其他大型用电设施“能够及时、有序地接入输电系统”。 据悉，这 6 家区域电网运营商 为 2 亿美国人提供服务 ，覆盖管辖范围内约三分之二人口。委员会还邀请负责地区输电系统的公用事业公司参与。分析人士认为，委员会未来也可能要求更多电力企业加快改革。 美国电力研究院数据显示，数据中心目前约占美国用电需求的 5%，到 2035 年可能增至现在的三倍。
items.summary_en: The US Federal Energy Regulatory Commission ordered six regional grid operators to accelerate the connection of large power users, including AI data centers, to the transmission system. The order aims to address surging electricity demand from AI, with some data centers consuming more power than small cities. The move covers operators serving 200 million Americans.
items.why_zh: 该命令反映了AI发展对能源基础设施的巨大压力，可能推动美国电网加速升级。
items.why_en: This order reflects the immense pressure AI development places on energy infrastructure, potentially accelerating US grid upgrades.

items.summary_en: Luca Guadagnino's film about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, Artificial , has reportedly been dropped by Amazon MGM. The film, which stars Andrew Garfield and covers the rollercoaster five days in 2023 spanning Altman's termination and reinstatement as CEO, had been in the works for about a year . The cast also includes A Complete Unknown actress Monica Barbaro as OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, Ike Barinholtz as Elon Musk, and Anora 's Yura Borisov as OpenAI chief scientist Ilya Sutskever. In a statement to Deadline , the studio said it believes the movie "will be better served if it were released by a differ…
items.why_zh: 这一决定反映了科技传记片在商业和艺术上的挑战，也凸显了奥特曼故事的争议性。
items.why_en: This decision highlights the commercial and artistic challenges of tech biopics, and the controversial nature of Altman's story.

items.title_zh: 广东：加快形成联通港澳的低空跨境物流网络
items.title_en: Guangdong Accelerates Low-Altitude Cross-Border Logistics Network with Hong Kong and Macau
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 19 日消息，广东省人民政府 19 日（今天）印发《广东省推进服务业扩能提质实施方案》提出，发挥龙头网络货运平台优势，支持全国性、全球性道路运输企业在粤布局经营，推动传统公路货运企业向仓储管理、流通加工、订单管理、供应链服务等增值服务延伸，发展网络货运等高效集约运输业务。加强与全球知名航空、航运物流企业对接合作，积极拓展国际航线网络，支持大型物流企业建设前置货站、研究布局海外仓，推动枢纽机场完善综合交通集疏运体系。 IT之家获悉，《方案》提出，培育发展通用航空运输业务，积极发展低空物流， 加强低空飞行活动管理的省市统筹，加快形成联通港澳的低空跨境物流网络 。积极探索跨市协同运输、自动驾驶运输场景。完善管道运输网络，推进珠三角内环管网与省管网之间实质性联通。 《方案》提出，抢抓人工智能发展机遇，建设 具有国际竞争力的软件和信息技术服务业创新中心 。培育引进更多具有核心竞争力的软件企业，打造一批全国领先的数字化转型服务商。构建 AI 赋能软件信息服务体系，大力发展通用大模型和行业专用大模型，推动 AI 编程、数字营销、游戏文娱等业务重点发展，孵化培育 AI+ 软件生态独角兽企业。深入实施核心软件攻关工程，聚焦基础软件和重点领域工业软件，组织重大科技攻关，突破关键核心技术。建设核心软件应用推广服务平台，扩大重点行业试点应用规模。 《方案》还明确，加快开源生态建设，依托省…
items.summary_en: Guangdong province plans to develop low-altitude logistics networks connecting Hong Kong and Macau, and boost AI and software innovation. The initiative aims to foster general and industry-specific large models.
items.why_zh: 该政策将推动低空经济和 AI 产业在广东的融合发展，具有战略意义。
items.why_en: This policy promotes the integration of low-altitude economy and AI in Guangdong, with strategic significance.

items.title_zh: 消息称 Momenta 估值冲至 90 亿美元，赴港 IPO 剑指 10 亿美元募资
items.title_en: Momenta Valued at $9B, Plans Hong Kong IPO to Raise $1B
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 19 日消息，据《华尔街日报》援引知情人士消息称，中国自动驾驶公司 Momenta 估值已达到约 90 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 610.52 亿元人民币），正准备赴港上市，计划 通过 IPO 募资约 10 亿美元（现汇率约合 67.84 亿元人民币） 。 Momenta 将自身定位为 自动驾驶汽车的“大脑” ，主要向车企提供驾驶辅助解决方案。中国证监会 18 日公布了一份日期为 6 月 10 日的通知。通知显示，Momenta 计划在香港上市时 最多发行 4375 万股 ，备案申请已根据公司提交的材料获得批准。 一旦成功上市，Momenta 将成为又一家赴港融资的中国科技及机器人初创企业。文远知行、小马智行两家自动驾驶公司去年已经在香港上市，希望获得更多资金，用于扩大车队规模和推进技术研发。 接连有科技企业赴港上市，意味着香港今年有望迎来 IPO 大年。香港交易所数据显示，2026 年前 5 个月，企业在香港市场募资约 1668 亿港元（现汇率约合 1443.85 亿元人民币），较上年同期的 792 亿港元增长超过一倍。 相关阅读： 《 Momenta 港股 IPO 获证监会备案 》
items.summary_en: Chinese autonomous driving company Momenta is valued at $9 billion and plans a Hong Kong IPO to raise $1 billion. It provides driver assistance solutions to automakers.
items.why_zh: Momenta 的高估值和 IPO 计划反映了自动驾驶赛道的资本热度。
items.why_en: Momenta's high valuation and IPO plans reflect strong capital interest in autonomous driving.

items.title_zh: 马斯克预测中国大模型 2027 年 Q1 追上 Anthropic Fable，智谱创始人唐杰回应“用不了那么久”
items.title_en: Musk Predicts Chinese LLMs to Catch Up with Anthropic Fable by Q1 2027; Zhipu Founder Tang Jie Says 'Sooner'
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 19 日消息，北京时间 6 月 17 日，智谱正式上线并开源了新一代旗舰大模型 GLM-5.2。 在技术评测方面，GLM-5.2 在 FrontierSWE 编程基准测试中得分 74.4，超过了 OpenAI GPT-5.5，仅落后 Anthropic 顶级闭源模型 Claude Opus 4.8 约 1 个百分点。 因此，一位网友昨晚在 X 上发帖提问：“中国大模型预计何时能够达到 Anthropic Fable 水平？GLM-5.2 无疑缩短了差距。” 对此，特斯拉 CEO 埃隆 · 马斯克回复表示，可能要到 2027 年第一季度。清华大学教授、智谱 AI 联合创始人兼首席科学家唐杰随后回应称，不需要那么久。 马斯克随后补充道，要想在跑分方面赶上 Fable 相对容易，但如果以“实用性”来衡量，就算是到 2027 年第一季度能达到该水平也已经属于非常出色的表现，毕竟 Anthropic 一直追求的就是实用性。 Anthropic Fable 5 发布于 6 月 9 日，这也是 Anthropic 目前公开可用能力最强的 Claude 模型，在软件工程、知识工作、视觉理解、科学研究等领域表现突出，能够处理涉及 5000 万行代码迁移等高难度工作，并配备了动态安全防护机制。然而，这款模型发布仅数日后便遭遇管制。 对于马斯克的预测，有 AI 业内人士认为其判断相对保…
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI released and open-sourced its new flagship model GLM-5.2, which scored 74.4 on the FrontierSWE benchmark, surpassing OpenAI GPT-5.5 and trailing Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 by only 1 point. Musk predicted Chinese LLMs would match Anthropic Fable by Q1 2027, but Zhipu co-founder Tang Jie disagreed, saying it would happen sooner. Musk noted that catching up on benchmarks is easier, but achieving practical utility by then would be impressive.
items.why_zh: 这场关于中国大模型追赶速度的公开讨论，反映了全球AI竞争格局的加速以及业界对实用性与跑分差异的关注。
items.why_en: This public debate on the timeline for Chinese LLMs to catch up highlights the accelerating global AI competition and the industry's focus on the gap between benchmark scores and practical utility.

items.title_zh: 匹配市场与累积前景理论：迈向最优且对抗鲁棒的学习
items.title_en: Matching Markets meet Cumulative Prospect Theory: Towards Optimal and Adversarially Robust Learning
items.summary_zh: 该研究将匹配市场中的多智能体多臂老虎机问题与累积前景理论（CPT）结合，以模拟人类决策中的非线性偏好。CPT通过一个α-Hölder连续的权重函数来扭曲奖励，从而更真实地反映人类行为。研究分析了使用CPT权重扭曲奖励的先进学习算法，并获得了性能保证。这项工作有助于在竞争性匹配市场中设计更鲁棒且符合人类偏好的学习策略。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19883v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study a multi-agent multi-armed bandit problem in the competitive setup with two-sided matching markets under a human centric decision making model. To capture human preferences, we use cumulative prospect theory (CPT) that weighs the actions of the agent in a nonlinear fashion using a ($\alpha$-H\"older continuous) weight function. CPT has been widely used in behavioral economics and risk sensitive machine learning to emulate human preferences. We analyze the state-of-the-art learning algorithm with CPT weight distorted rewards and obtain a p…
items.why_zh: 该研究将行为经济学中的CPT引入机器学习，为设计更符合人类实际决策模式的AI系统提供了理论基础。
items.why_en: This work introduces CPT from behavioral economics into machine learning, providing a theoretical foundation for designing AI systems that better align with actual human decision-making.

items.title_zh: TensorFlow与Keras不良编码实践的隐藏环境成本：资源泄漏与碳排放研究
items.title_en: The Hidden Environmental Cost of Poor Coding Practices in TensorFlow and Keras Applications: A Study on Resource Leaks and Carbon Emissions
items.summary_zh: 一项针对机器学习应用中资源泄漏问题的实证研究揭示了不良编码实践对环境的隐藏影响。该研究聚焦于两种常见的资源泄漏模式：不当模型复用（IMR）和未释放张量引用，发现这些泄漏会显著增加能源消耗和二氧化碳排放。尽管可持续性已成为ML开发的重要考量，但此前缺乏量化环境影响的实证证据。这项初步研究填补了这一空白，为开发者优化代码以减少碳足迹提供了依据。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19799v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Efficiency and sustainability are critical considerations in the development and deployment of machine learning (ML) applications. Among the factors influencing sustainability, resource leaks in ML code can introduce hidden inefficiencies that elevate energy consumption and CO2 emissions. Despite this, empirical evidence quantifying their environmental impact remains limited. This emerging results paper presents an initial empirical investigation of two common resource-leak smells, namely Improper Model Reuse (IMR) and Unreleased Tensor Referen…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次量化了ML代码中资源泄漏的环境影响，为绿色AI开发提供了重要参考。
items.why_en: This study provides the first empirical evidence linking resource leaks in ML code to increased carbon emissions, highlighting the need for sustainable coding practices.

items.why_zh: 投资方涵盖科技、新能源、电商等多个领域，显示DeepSeek的跨行业吸引力。
items.why_en: The diverse investor base across tech, energy, and e-commerce highlights DeepSeek's cross-industry appeal.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek获510亿融资，投资方公布：腾讯、宁德时代、京东、网易等
items.title_en: DeepSeek Raises 51 Billion Yuan from Tencent, CATL, and Others
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek获510亿融资，投资方公布：腾讯、宁德时代、京东、网易等 京报网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek's 51 billion yuan Series A round includes Tencent, CATL, JD.com, and NetEase, pushing its valuation to nearly 400 billion yuan.
items.why_zh: 投资方阵容显示产业资本对AI基础技术的战略布局，DeepSeek的估值增长反映了市场对AI大模型公司的信心。
items.why_en: The investor lineup shows strategic industrial capital deployment in AI infrastructure, and DeepSeek's valuation growth reflects market confidence in large model companies.

items.title_zh: 智谱科创板IPO拟募资150亿，“大模型第一股”呼之欲出
items.title_en: Zhipu Plans 15 Billion Yuan IPO on STAR Market, Poised to Become 'First Large Model Stock'
items.summary_zh: 智谱科创板IPO拟募资150亿，“大模型第一股”呼之欲出 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu plans a 15 billion yuan IPO on the STAR Market, aiming to become China's first publicly traded large model company, according to Sina Finance. This marks a milestone for AI model companies entering capital markets.
items.why_zh: 智谱若成功上市，将成为中国大模型领域首家上市公司，具有标杆意义。
items.why_en: Zhipu's IPO would set a precedent as the first publicly traded large model company in China.

items.title_zh: 谁来决定AI何时过于危险？
items.title_en: Who decides when AI is too dangerous?
items.summary_zh: 在《The Verge》的Decoder节目中，高级AI记者Hayden Field讨论了Anthropic的新模型Fable 5及其背后的Mythos模型。美国政府在上周五对这两个模型实施了出口管制，限制外国国民（包括为Anthropic工作的外国人）访问。这一事件引发了关于谁有权判定AI模型是否过于危险的讨论，涉及政府监管、企业责任和国际安全。
items.summary_en: On today’s episode of Decoder , my guest is Hayden Field, senior AI reporter for The Verge . Often when Hayden comes on the show, it’s because something has gone wrong in the world of AI. Last weekend, that something was a pretty intense mix of Anthropic, the Trump administration, and Anthropic’s new AI model, Fable 5. On Friday, not even a week since Anthropic released Fable to the public, the US government said it was imposing export controls on the new model , as well as the underlying Mythos model that Fable is based on. Those controls restricted foreign nationals, even those working for A…
items.why_zh: 该事件凸显了AI安全与出口管制之间的紧张关系，对全球AI治理具有重要影响。
items.why_en: This incident highlights the tension between AI safety and export controls, with significant implications for global AI governance.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek超500亿元融资细节曝光：投资方不得挖DeepSeek员工或劝其单飞创业
items.title_en: Details of DeepSeek's $50B+ Funding: Investors Barred from Poaching Employees or Encouraging Spin-offs
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek超500亿元融资细节曝光：投资方不得挖DeepSeek员工或劝其单飞创业 TradingView
items.summary_en: Details of DeepSeek's over $50 billion funding reveal a clause barring investors from poaching employees or encouraging them to start their own ventures. This rare provision aims to protect DeepSeek's talent pool, highlighting the critical importance of human capital in AI companies.
items.why_zh: 该条款反映了AI行业人才争夺的激烈程度，以及公司对核心团队的重视。
items.why_en: The clause underscores the fierce talent war in AI and companies' emphasis on retaining core teams.

items.title_zh: 融资消息曝光后DeepSeek上线识图模式，但认不出梁文锋
items.title_en: DeepSeek Launches Image Recognition Mode After Funding News, But Can't Recognize Liang Wenfeng
items.summary_zh: 融资消息曝光后DeepSeek上线识图模式，但认不出梁文锋 thepaper.cn
items.summary_en: After funding news, DeepSeek launched an image recognition mode, but it failed to recognize founder Liang Wenfeng in tests, according to thepaper.cn. This raises questions about technical maturity, though it may be an early version limitation.
items.why_zh: 识图模式未能识别创始人，暴露了DeepSeek在计算机视觉方面的当前短板。
items.why_en: The failure to recognize its own founder highlights current limitations in DeepSeek's computer vision capabilities.

items.title_zh: 智谱科创板IPO辅导验收 新模型刺激市值破8800亿港元
items.title_en: Zhipu Passes STAR Market IPO Guidance, New Model Boosts Market Cap Over 880 Billion HKD
items.summary_zh: 智谱科创板IPO辅导验收 新模型刺激市值破8800亿港元 财新
items.summary_en: Zhipu has passed the STAR Market IPO guidance, and its new model launch boosted market cap to over 880 billion HKD, according to Caixin. This marks a key step toward listing and reflects positive market reception.
items.why_zh: 智谱IPO辅导验收和新模型发布同步推进，显示其上市准备充分且技术实力获市场认可。
items.why_en: The simultaneous progress in IPO guidance and new model launch demonstrates Zhipu's readiness and market confidence in its technology.

items.title_zh: 西安医生用AI豆包诊断事件，官方调查结果和处理措施是什么？
items.title_en: Xi'an Doctor Uses AI 'Doubao' for Diagnosis: Official Investigation and Measures
items.summary_zh: 西安医生用AI豆包诊断事件，官方调查结果和处理措施是什么？ 新浪网
items.summary_en: Authorities have released findings and actions regarding a Xi'an doctor who used AI 'Doubao' for diagnosis, sparking discussions on AI ethics and regulation in healthcare.
items.why_zh: 该事件凸显了AI在医疗诊断中应用的潜在风险，以及加强监管的必要性。
items.why_en: This incident highlights the risks of AI in medical diagnosis and the need for stricter regulation.

items.title_zh: 金山办公将于下月推出组织级 AI 办公产品“企业大脑”WPS Comate，可整合公司数据打造 AI 工具
items.title_en: Kingsoft Office to Launch Enterprise AI Product 'Enterprise Brain' WPS Comate Next Month
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 20 日消息，金山办公副总裁王少康在四川省自贡市举行的“2026 人民数据大会”上透露公司将于下月（7 月）正式推出组织级 AI 办公产品“企业大脑”WPS Comate，后续将实现规模化交付落地。 据介绍，相应“企业大脑”不同于面向个人效率提升的办公性智能体，其重点面向知识密集的中大型组织，主打复杂业务场景。 具体来看，该产品整合并激活分散在组织各处的结构化与非结构化数据，之后利用 AI 理解组织结构与团队协作关系，并生成数字员工等 AI 产品融入业务运营与决策环节，进一步帮助员工通过跨工具协同完成组织专业任务。 金山办公表示，后续公司将进一步对接客户，帮助不同公司根据具体情况设计专属的“企业大脑”，从而实组织内部数据、系统、流程和知识资源高效连接，打造 AI 统一入口。
items.summary_en: Kingsoft Office will launch 'Enterprise Brain' WPS Comate in July, an AI product for knowledge-intensive organizations. It integrates data, generates digital employees, and enables cross-tool collaboration, with customized versions for clients.
items.why_zh: 该产品标志着AI办公从个人效率工具向组织级智能平台的升级，可能重塑企业办公模式。
items.why_en: This product marks a shift from personal AI productivity tools to organization-level intelligent platforms, potentially reshaping enterprise workflows.

items.title_zh: 3家AI精准命中3:0，巴西首胜背后AI六连中
items.title_en: Three AIs Accurately Predict Brazil 3-0 Win, Achieving Six Consecutive Correct Predictions
items.summary_zh: 3家AI精准命中3:0，巴西首胜背后AI六连中 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Three AI systems correctly predicted Brazil's 3-0 victory, marking six consecutive correct predictions. This demonstrates AI's capability in sports forecasting, though questions about data reliance and chance remain.
items.why_zh: AI连续准确预测体育赛事结果，展示了其在数据分析领域的潜力，但也需警惕过度解读。
items.why_en: AI's streak of accurate sports predictions showcases its data analysis potential, but caution against overinterpretation is warranted.

items.title_zh: 马斯克：中国AI明年Q1追上Anthropic 智谱： 不用那么久
items.title_en: Musk Says Chinese AI Will Catch Up to Anthropic by Q1 Next Year; Zhipu Responds: Sooner
items.summary_zh: 马斯克：中国AI明年Q1追上Anthropic 智谱： 不用那么久 每日经济新闻
items.summary_en: Elon Musk predicted Chinese AI will catch up to Anthropic by Q1 next year. Zhipu AI responded 'sooner,' indicating faster progress. This debate reflects US-China AI competition and differing expectations.
items.why_zh: 该争论凸显了中美AI竞争加剧，以及中国AI公司对自身发展速度的信心。
items.why_en: This debate highlights intensifying US-China AI competition and Chinese AI companies' confidence in their rapid progress.

items.title_zh: LLM无法识别自身知识盲区：跨模型归因差异检测临床表格数据中的认知盲点
items.title_en: LLM Doesn't Know What It Doesn't Know: Detecting Epistemic Blind Spots via Cross-Model Attribution Divergence on Clinical Tabular Data
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）越来越多地应用于结构化临床数据，但它们能否识别自身在这些任务上的知识局限尚不清楚。本研究通过跨模型归因差异的视角，旨在减少结构化任务中的认知不确定性，比较了Qwen 2.5 7B和XGBoost在预测任务上的归因差异分析。报告了四项发现：首先，LLM的语言化置信度在认知上是空洞的，其输出接近常数（0.856-0.937）。这表明LLM无法有效表达其不确定性，可能导致在临床决策中过度自信。该研究强调了开发更可靠的不确定性量化方法的必要性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19509v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to structured clinical data, yet whether they can recognize the limits of their own knowledge on such tasks remains unexplored. We study this question through the lens of cross-model attribution divergence with the goal of reducing epistemic uncertainty for structured tasks, comparing Qwen 2.5 7B and XGBoost on a prediction task via attribution divergence analysis. We report four findings. First, LLM verbalized confidence is epistemically vacuous, it outputs a near-constant (0.856-0.937) regar…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM在关键临床应用中无法识别自身知识盲区的风险，对AI安全与可靠性有重要意义。
items.why_en: This study reveals the risk that LLMs cannot recognize their own knowledge blind spots in critical clinical applications, important for AI safety and reliability.

items.title_zh: LLM智能体中用于澄清寻求的不确定性分解
items.title_en: Uncertainty Decomposition for Clarification Seeking in LLM Agents
items.summary_zh: 近期立场论文认为，经典的偶然/认知不确定性框架不足以应对交互式大型语言模型（LLM）智能体，并呼吁开发具有未指定性感知、可分解且可沟通的不确定性表示，以解锁主动澄清寻求和共享心智模型构建等新能力。实际部署约束（如黑盒API、交互延迟预算和缺乏标注轨迹）排除了基于对数概率、多次采样和基于训练的方法。本文提出了一种新的不确定性分解方法，旨在满足这些约束，使LLM智能体能够主动寻求澄清，提高交互质量。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19559v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent position papers argue that the classical aleatoric/epistemic uncertainty framework is insufficient for interactive large language model (LLM) agents and call for underspecification-aware, decomposed, and communicable uncertainty representations that can unlock new agent capabilities such as proactive clarification seeking and shared mental-model building. Practical deployment constraints -- black-box APIs, interactive latency budgets, and the absence of labeled trajectories -- rule out logprob-based, multi-sampling, and training-based meth…
items.why_zh: 该研究为LLM智能体实现主动澄清寻求提供了可行方案，对提升人机交互的准确性和效率至关重要。
items.why_en: This work provides a feasible solution for LLM agents to proactively seek clarification, crucial for improving accuracy and efficiency in human-AI interaction.

items.title_zh: LLM后训练中应比较哪些配对？
items.title_en: Which Pairs to Compare for LLM Post-Training?
items.summary_zh: 基于偏好的后训练已成为对齐语言模型的核心范式。常见的数据收集策略是为每个提示生成少量补全，并标注生成的比较对。然而，人工偏好标签通常比生成额外补全昂贵得多，这提示了不同的预算使用方式：生成更大的补全集，但只标注信息量最大的比较对。本文研究了在基于偏好的后训练中应比较哪些配对，以在有限标注预算下最大化模型性能。通过理论分析和实验，作者提出了一种选择信息量最大的比较对的方法，从而更高效地利用标注资源。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19607v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Preference-based post-training has become a central paradigm for aligning language models. A common data-collection strategy is to generate a small set of completions for each prompt and label the resulting comparison pairs. However, human preference labels are often much more expensive than generating additional completions, suggesting a different use of the same labeling budget: generate a larger pool of completions, but label only the most informative comparison pairs. This paper studies which pairs should be compared in preference-based post-…
items.why_zh: 该研究优化了LLM后训练中的标注效率，对降低对齐成本、提升模型性能具有实际价值。
items.why_en: This study optimizes labeling efficiency in LLM post-training, offering practical value for reducing alignment costs and improving model performance.

items.title_zh: 去中心化联盟形成的退出与加入动态
items.title_en: Exit-and-Join Dynamics for Decentralized Coalition Formation
items.summary_zh: 本文研究联盟形成作为一种由单边退出和加入决策驱动的去中心化动态过程。智能体使用Aumann-Dreze值评估局部移动，因此收益在智能体当前联盟内计算，而非通过全局协商的联盟结构。由此产生的模型将合作收益分配与非合作最佳响应行为联系起来：终端划分正是没有可接受的、个体有利可图的退出-加入偏离的联盟结构。作者建立了均衡存在性等理论性质，并分析了动态过程的收敛性。该工作为理解去中心化多智能体系统中的合作形成提供了新视角。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19683v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper studies coalition formation as a decentralized dynamical process driven by unilateral exit-and-join decisions. Agents evaluate local moves using the Aumann-Dreze value, so payoffs are computed within the agent's current coalition rather than through a globally negotiated coalition structure. The resulting model links cooperative payoff allocation with noncooperative best-response behavior: a terminal partition is precisely a coalition structure with no admissible, individually profitable exit-and-join deviation. We establish equilibriu…
items.why_zh: 该研究为去中心化多智能体系统中的联盟形成提供了理论基础，对理解分布式协作机制有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work provides theoretical foundations for coalition formation in decentralized multi-agent systems, important for understanding distributed collaboration mechanisms.

items.title_zh: 超越静态排行榜：LLM智能体评估的预测有效性
items.title_en: Beyond Static Leaderboards: Predictive Validity for the Evaluation of LLM Agents
items.summary_zh: 智能体基准测试发展迅速，但单一基准测试很少涉及部署所暴露的超过四五个维度。本文汇总了迄今为止对一个基于MCP的工业智能体基准测试的最大规模协调深度研究：14项并行实现研究，涵盖新资产类别（包括多模态视觉扩展）、替代编排、检索策略、推理模式、基础设施优化和评估方法探索。结合这些研究与七个先前的智能体基准测试，作者论证了静态排行榜的局限性，并提出了预测有效性作为评估LLM智能体的新标准，强调基准测试应能预测实际部署中的性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19704v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Agent benchmarks are growing fast, but no single benchmark touches more than four or five of the dimensions that deployment exposes. This paper aggregates the largest coordinated deep-dive of one MCP-based industrial-agent benchmark to date: fourteen parallel implementation studies covering new asset classes (including a multi-modal visual extension), alternative orchestrations, retrieval strategies, reasoning modes, infrastructure optimizations, and evaluation-methodology probes. Consolidating those studies with seven prior agent benchmarks, we…
items.why_zh: 该研究挑战了当前LLM智能体评估的静态排行榜范式，提出了更贴近实际部署的预测有效性标准。
items.why_en: This study challenges the static leaderboard paradigm for LLM agent evaluation, proposing predictive validity as a more deployment-relevant standard.

items.title_zh: 预训练Transformer模型用于古兰经语音识别的比较研究：语音表示、标签格式与数据集组成
items.title_en: A Comparative Study of Pretrained Transformer Models for Quranic ASR: Speech Representations, Label Formats, and Dataset Composition
items.summary_zh: 古兰经自动语音识别（ASR）旨在将古兰经诵读转换为文本，支持辅助记忆工具和古兰经搜索引擎等应用。然而，现有ASR模型在用户诵读的经文上通常表现出高词错误率（WER），且缺乏对古兰经语料库的完整覆盖。本文对基于预训练Transformer模型的古兰经ASR领域微调进行了系统的实证研究，使用了先进的语音特征提取方法：Wav2Vec2.0、HuBERT和XLS-R。这些模型应用自监督学习，并在不同标签格式和数据集组成下进行比较。实验结果表明，特定领域的微调显著降低了WER，但完整覆盖仍需更大规模的数据集。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19747v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Quran Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) aims to convert Quranic recitation into text, enabling applications such as aided memorisation tools and Quranic search engines. However, existing ASR models often exhibit high Word Error Rates (WER) on user-recited verses and lack full coverage of the Quranic corpus. This paper presents a systematic empirical study of domain-specific fine-tuning of pretrained Transformer-based models for Quranic ASR, using advanced speech feature extraction methods: Wav2Vec2.0, HuBERT, and XLS-R. These models apply self-s…
items.why_zh: 该研究推动了古兰经ASR技术的发展，对宗教文本数字化和语言学习工具有重要应用价值。
items.why_en: This study advances Quranic ASR technology, with important applications for religious text digitization and language learning tools.

items.title_zh: 超越熵：从令牌级分布偏差中学习以增强LLM推理
items.title_en: Beyond Entropy: Learning from Token-Level Distributional Deviations for LLM Reasoning
items.summary_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）显著提升了大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，但面临根本的优化不稳定性：统一的令牌更新导致熵崩溃，过早收敛到次优策略；而过度的香农熵最大化可能导致熵爆炸，驱动盲目探索走向不连贯的推理链。为解决这一困境，本文引入了独立组合令牌（ICT）框架，将优化焦点从全局熵转移到令牌级分布偏差。ICT通过独立处理每个令牌的分布，避免了熵崩溃和熵爆炸，从而稳定了训练过程并提高了推理性能。实验表明，ICT在多个推理基准上优于现有方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19771v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has significantly advanced Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning; however, it faces a fundamental optimization instability: uniform token updates precipitate entropy collapse, leading to premature convergence to suboptimal strategies, whereas excessive Shannon Entropy maximization can cause entropy explosion, driving blind exploration toward incoherent reasoning chains. To resolve this dichotomy, we introduce the Independent Combinatorial Tokens (ICT) framework, which shifts the optimization fo…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了LLM推理强化学习中的关键优化不稳定问题，对提升模型推理能力具有重要价值。
items.why_en: This work addresses a key optimization instability in reinforcement learning for LLM reasoning, valuable for improving model reasoning capabilities.

items.title_zh: ORAgentBench：LLM智能体能端到端解决具有挑战性的运筹学任务吗？
items.title_en: ORAgentBench: Can LLM Agents Solve Challenging Operations Research Tasks End to End?
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型越来越多地被部署为可执行环境中多步任务的自主智能体，但它们在现实运筹学（OR）工作中的能力仍不清楚。现有的OR评估通常将建模与求解分离，依赖预形式化或纯文本实例，很少测试从操作工件到验证决策的完整工作流。本文介绍了ORAgentBench，一个基于执行环境的基准测试，用于评估自主智能体在具有挑战性的端到端运筹学任务上的表现。该基准测试涵盖了从问题理解、建模、求解到决策验证的完整流程，旨在全面评估LLM智能体的OR能力。初步结果表明，当前LLM智能体在复杂OR任务上仍存在显著不足。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19787v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents for multi-step tasks in executable environments, yet their ability to perform realistic operations research (OR) work remains unclear. Existing OR evaluations often decouple modeling from solving, rely on pre-formalized or text-only instances, and rarely test the full workflow from operational artifacts to validated decisions. In this work, we introduce ORAgentBench, an execution-grounded benchmark for evaluating autonomous agents on challenging end-to-end operations research ta…
items.why_zh: 该基准测试填补了LLM智能体在运筹学领域评估的空白，对推动AI在优化决策中的应用具有指导意义。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in evaluating LLM agents for operations research, guiding the application of AI in optimization and decision-making.

items.title_zh: CombEval：评估大语言模型组合计数能力的框架
items.title_en: CombEval: A Framework for Evaluating Combinatorial Counting in Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: arXiv 上发布了一项新研究，提出了 CombEval，这是一个用于评估大语言模型组合计数能力的动态基准。CombEval 将每个问题表示为类型化的 Cofola 规范，涵盖实体、组合对象、对象依赖关系和约束，从而能够可控地生成自然语言计数问题，并附带精确的求解器验证答案。与静态数据集不同，CombEval 支持对对象类型、实体规模、约束数量和推理深度进行系统变化。研究者在直接和代码增强设置下评估了 11 个大语言模型，发现当前模型在组合计数任务上表现有限，尤其是随着问题复杂度增加，性能显著下降。该框架为衡量和提升 LLM 的数学推理能力提供了新工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19788v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present CombEval, a dynamic benchmark for evaluating combinatorial counting in large language models. CombEval represents each problem as a typed Cofola specification over entities, combinatorial objects, object dependencies, and constraints, enabling controlled generation of natural-language counting problems with exact solver-verified answers. Unlike static collections, CombEval supports systematic variation of object type, entity scale, constraint count, and reasoning depth. We evaluate 11 LLMs under direct and code-augmented settings and f…
items.why_zh: 组合计数是数学推理的核心能力，CombEval 提供了系统评估 LLM 这方面能力的方法，有助于发现模型弱点并推动改进。
items.why_en: Combinatorial counting is a core mathematical reasoning skill; CombEval provides a systematic way to evaluate LLMs on this capability, revealing weaknesses and guiding improvements.

items.title_zh: 人机协同编排：AI 辅助法律发现中的轨迹崩溃问题
items.title_en: Human-on-the-Loop Orchestration for AI-Assisted Legal Discovery
items.summary_zh: arXiv 上的一项新研究指出，自主大语言模型代理在电子发现（e-discovery）中日益普及，但多步推理链中的累积错误可能导致法律失职。与单轮检索不同，在特权文档集上运行的代理工作流会出现一种称为“轨迹崩溃”的故障模式：早期错误分类无声传播，导致整个特权审查失效。本文提出了三个贡献：首先，提出了法律领域中代理故障的结构化分类；其次，设计了人机协同编排框架，在关键决策点引入人工监督；最后，通过实验验证了该方法能有效减少轨迹崩溃，提高审查可靠性。该研究强调了在敏感法律场景中保持人类监督的重要性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.19812v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autonomous Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed in electronic discovery (e-discovery), where compounding errors across multi-step reasoning chains can constitute legal malpractice. Unlike single-turn retrieval, agentic workflows operating over privileged document corpora exhibit a class of failure we term "trajectory collapse": an early misclassification silently propagates, rendering an entire privilege review invalid. This paper makes three contributions. First, we propose a structured taxonomy of agentic failures in lega…
items.why_zh: 法律发现中 AI 的错误可能造成严重后果，该研究提出了人机协同方案，确保关键决策有人类把关，对 AI 在司法领域的可靠应用至关重要。
items.why_en: AI errors in legal discovery can have serious consequences; this work proposes human-on-the-loop orchestration to ensure reliability, crucial for AI deployment in judicial contexts.

items.title_zh: 基于多头注意力的特征提取器与软演员-评论家算法融合用于增材制造孔隙率预测与工艺参数优化
items.title_en: Multi-Head Attention-Based Feature Extractor Integration with Soft Actor-Critic for Porosity Prediction and Process Parameter Optimization in Additive Manufacturing
items.summary_zh: arXiv 上的一项研究针对增材制造中的工艺优化问题，提出了一种结合多头注意力机制与软演员-评论家（SAC）算法的新架构。传统强化学习方法使用离散动作空间，存在收敛慢、易陷入局部最优的问题。该研究采用连续动作空间，并利用注意力机制提取关键特征，从而更有效地预测孔隙率并优化工艺参数。实验结果表明，该方法在孔隙率预测精度和参数优化效率上均优于现有方法，为高精度制造提供了新的解决方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20087v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Additive manufacturing process optimization requires precise parameter control to minimize defects such as porosity. Traditional reinforcement learning (RL) approaches using discrete action spaces suffer from slow convergence and susceptibility to local optima, limiting their effectiveness for high-precision manufacturing tasks. This study addresses these limitations by employing a continuous action space combined with a novel architecture that integrates a multi-head attention mechanism with the Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) algorithm. The attention-b…
items.why_zh: 该研究将先进 AI 技术应用于制造业，解决了传统强化学习在工艺优化中的局限性，有望提升增材制造的质量和效率。
items.why_en: This work applies advanced AI to manufacturing, overcoming limitations of traditional RL in process optimization, potentially improving quality and efficiency in additive manufacturing.

items.title_zh: ScaffoldAgent：面向开放式深度研究的效用引导动态大纲优化
items.title_en: ScaffoldAgent: Utility-Guided Dynamic Outline Optimization for Open-Ended Deep Research
items.summary_zh: arXiv 上发布了一项关于开放式深度研究（OEDR）的新研究，提出了 ScaffoldAgent 框架。OEDR 要求系统通过多轮检索获取知识并生成连贯的长篇报告，大纲在其中起关键作用。现有方法要么在写作前固定大纲，要么使用局部启发式方法优化，导致在持续信息积累下出现“大纲漂移”。ScaffoldAgent 采用效用引导的动态大纲优化，根据信息积累实时调整大纲结构，并利用延迟反馈评估修改效果。实验表明，该方法能有效减少大纲漂移，提高最终报告的质量和连贯性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20122v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Open-ended deep research (OEDR) requires systems to acquire knowledge through multi-round retrieval and generate coherent long-form reports. The outline plays a central role as a structural scaffold that coordinates retrieval, evidence organization, and generation. However, existing methods either fix the outline before writing or refine it with local heuristics, leading to scaffold drift under continuous information accumulation and delayed feedback for evaluating outline modifications. We propose ScaffoldAgent, a utility-guided dynamic outline…
items.why_zh: 开放式深度研究是 AI 系统的重要能力，ScaffoldAgent 通过动态大纲优化解决了信息积累中的结构漂移问题，提升了长篇报告生成的可靠性。
items.why_en: Open-ended deep research is a key AI capability; ScaffoldAgent addresses scaffold drift during information accumulation, improving reliability of long-form report generation.

items.title_zh: 学习提示：利用自适应大语言模型高中辅导提升学生参与度
items.title_en: Learning to Prompt: Improving Student Engagement with Adaptive LLM-based High-School Tutoring
items.summary_zh: arXiv 上的一项研究开发并测试了一种基于大语言模型的个性化辅导系统。该系统采用学科感知提示，从原始对话记录中提取 14 个教学特征（如教师脚手架、学生理解度）。研究者首先在模拟环境中训练提示路由模型，然后在实际高中生中部署进行在线自适应。模拟基准测试显示，路由模型优于两个静态基线（0.694 vs 0.647 和 0.6）。实际部署中，自适应系统相比静态提示显著提高了学生参与度。该研究表明，通过动态调整提示策略，LLM 可以更好地适应不同学科和学生需求，提升教育效果。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20138v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLMs can personalize education, although current static-prompt tutoring systems struggle to adapt to diverse academic disciplines. We develop and test a system with subject-aware prompting, based on 14 pedagogical features (e.g., tutor scaffolding, student understanding) extracted from raw transcripts. We first train a prompt routing model in a simulation environment, and then deploy it for online adaptation with actual high-school students. The simulation benchmark shows the router outperforming two static baselines ($0.694$ vs. $0.647$ and $0.6…
items.why_zh: 个性化教育是 AI 的重要应用方向，该研究通过自适应提示策略提升了 LLM 辅导系统的效果，对推动智能教育发展具有实际意义。
items.why_en: Personalized education is a key AI application; this work improves LLM tutoring effectiveness through adaptive prompting, with practical implications for intelligent education.

items.title_zh: BIM-Edit：基于 IFC 的建筑信息模型大语言模型编辑基准
items.title_en: BIM-Edit: Benchmarking Large Language Models for IFC-Based Building Information Modeling
items.summary_zh: arXiv 上发布了一项新基准 BIM-Edit，用于评估大语言模型在建筑信息模型（BIM）编辑任务上的能力。与现有 CAD 基准主要关注创建新模型不同，BIM-Edit 专注于自然语言驱动的现有模型编辑，要求模型理解场景、正确编辑并保持语义和关系。该基准基于 IFC 标准，包含多种编辑任务。初步评估显示，当前 LLM 在理解复杂建筑语义和保持结构一致性方面仍有挑战。该工作为将 LLM 应用于工程实践中的模型编辑提供了评估标准。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20146v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to computer-aided design (CAD) to generate design artifacts from textual instructions. In engineering practice, this requires more than creating new geometry, models must also understand existing scenes, edit them correctly, and preserve semantics and relations. However, many CAD benchmarks focus on creating new models rather than editing existing ones, and mostly evaluate geometric correctness. We introduce BIM-Edit, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs on natural-language editing of Building Info…
items.why_zh: BIM 编辑是工程实践中的常见需求，该基准填补了现有 CAD 基准只重创建不重编辑的空白，有助于推动 LLM 在工程领域的应用。
items.why_en: BIM editing is a common engineering task; this benchmark fills the gap in evaluating LLMs on editing, promoting their application in engineering.

items.title_zh: 无模块化冲突避免训练用于广义物理信息神经网络
items.title_en: Modularity-Free Conflict-Averse Training for Generalized PINNs
items.summary_zh: arXiv 上的一项研究揭示了物理信息神经网络（PINN）训练中的一个新问题：随着模型容量增加，冲突避免优化方案的效果会下降。研究者发现，过参数化网络会出现功能模块化，即网络自划分为任务特定子网络，导致梯度干扰加剧。为此，他们提出了无模块化冲突避免训练方法，通过正则化抑制模块化倾向，从而保持冲突避免策略的有效性。实验表明，该方法在多种 PDE 问题上提升了 PINN 的精度和训练稳定性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20156v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have become a powerful framework for solving PDEs by embedding physical laws into differentiable objectives. Despite their advances, training PINNs remains fragile: recent conflict-averse optimization schemes alleviate gradient interference between residual and boundary losses, but we show that their effectiveness deteriorates as model capacity increases. In this paper, we identify a capacity-induced failure mode, where overparameterized networks undergo functional modularity, self-partitioning into task-e…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了 PINN 训练中容量增加导致的新问题，并提出了有效解决方案，对提升物理信息神经网络的可靠性和可扩展性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work uncovers a new failure mode in PINNs due to increased capacity and proposes a solution, important for improving reliability and scalability of physics-informed neural networks.

items.title_zh: 大语言模型的表面心理特征主要是测量伪影
items.title_en: Apparent Psychological Profiles of Large Language Models are Largely a Measurement Artifact
items.summary_zh: arXiv 上的一项研究通过形式心理测量学框架，证明了大语言模型被赋予的稳定心理特征在很大程度上是测量伪影。研究者对 56 个指令微调 LLM 和大量人类参考样本进行了人格和风险偏好测试（包括自我报告和行为任务），发现了四个主要结果：LLM 的测试结果对提示措辞高度敏感；不同 LLM 之间的差异小于同一模型在不同提示下的差异；LLM 的得分与人类常模存在系统性偏差；且这些得分缺乏跨时间稳定性。研究警告，将人类心理工具直接用于 LLM 可能产生误导性结论。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20205v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Psychological instruments designed for humans are increasingly used to assign large language models (LLMs) stable psychological profiles that affect their usability, safety assessment, and use as proxies for human participants in research. Using a formal psychometric framework, we show that these profiles are largely a measurement artifact. Administering a battery of personality and risk-preference instruments spanning self-reports and behavioral tasks to 56 instruction-tuned LLMs alongside large human reference samples, we report four findings.…
items.why_zh: 该研究质疑了当前将人类心理测试用于 LLM 的做法，指出其结果是测量伪影，对 AI 安全评估和以 LLM 作为人类代理的研究具有重要警示意义。
items.why_en: This study challenges the practice of applying human psychological tests to LLMs, showing results are artifacts, with important implications for AI safety assessment and using LLMs as human proxies.

items.title_zh: QMFOL：通过可量化的单子一阶逻辑测试用例生成来基准测试大语言模型推理能力
items.title_en: QMFOL: Benchmarking Large Language Model Reasoning via Quantifiable Monadic First-Order Logic Test Case Generation
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）在推理方面取得了显著进展，尤其是演绎推理，这对高风险决策至关重要。随着模型改进，评估基准也应同步发展。然而，现有基准缺乏对逻辑复杂性的细粒度控制，且难以平衡语义多样性与逻辑一致性。为此，研究者提出了QMFOL，一个自动生成单子一阶逻辑推理任务的框架，具有可量化和可控的复杂性。该框架能够生成逻辑复杂度可调节的测试用例，从而更精确地评估LLM的推理能力。QMFOL有望推动LLM推理评估的标准化和精细化发展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20227v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made significant progress in reasoning, particularly in deductive reasoning, which is crucial for high-stakes decision-making. As models improve, evaluation benchmarks should evolve to keep pace. However, existing benchmarks lack fine-grained control over logical complexity and struggle to balance semantic diversity with logical consistency. To address these issues, we propose QMFOL, an automated framework for generating monadic first-order logic reasoning tasks with quantifiable and controllable complexity. It c…
items.why_zh: QMFOL提供了可量化逻辑复杂度的测试用例生成方法，填补了现有LLM推理基准在逻辑复杂度控制上的空白。
items.why_en: QMFOL fills the gap in existing LLM reasoning benchmarks by providing test cases with quantifiable logical complexity.

items.title_zh: 置信度感知的学生科学模型绘图自动评估
items.title_en: Confidence-Aware Automated Assessment of Student-Drawn Scientific Models
items.summary_zh: 学生绘制的图画在科学教育中被广泛用于评估学习者对建模任务的概念理解，这些任务符合下一代科学标准（NGSS）。然而，评分这些图画需要专家人工判断来解释复杂的视觉表示，使得大规模评估在课堂环境中实施和维持成本高昂。本研究使用基于视觉的模型自动评分学生绘制的科学图画。研究者评估了带有参数高效微调的Vision Transformer（ViT）模型，并引入了置信度感知机制，以提高评估的可靠性和可解释性。该方法有望降低科学教育中大规模评估的成本，同时保持评分质量。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20264v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Student-generated drawings are widely used in science education to assess learners' conceptual understanding in modeling-based tasks aligned with the Next Generation Science Standards (NGSS). However, scoring such drawings requires expert human judgment to interpret complex visual representations, making large-scale assessment costly to implement and sustain in classroom settings. In this work, we study automated scoring of student-generated scientific drawings using a vision-based model. We evaluate a Vision Transformer (ViT) with parameter-effi…
items.why_zh: 该研究为科学教育中大规模、低成本的学生绘图评估提供了自动化解决方案，并引入了置信度感知机制。
items.why_en: This research provides an automated, cost-effective solution for large-scale assessment of student drawings in science education, with confidence-aware mechanisms.

items.title_zh: SoftSkill：用于上下文适应的行为压缩
items.title_en: SoftSkill: Behavioral Compression for Contextual Adaptation
items.summary_zh: 智能体技能通常以自然语言Markdown文件形式部署，编码答案策略、证据使用习惯和任务流程。这些文件可读且可移植，但间接消耗：对于每个任务实例，冻结的语言模型必须将长文本工件转换为生成时的行为。本文提出是否可以用自然语言技能初始化一个紧凑的连续上下文对象，通过可训练的软增量进行优化，同时保持基础模型冻结。研究者提出了SoftSkill，一种冻结骨干网络的方法，将技能压缩为连续向量，从而更高效地适应不同上下文。实验表明，SoftSkill在保持性能的同时显著减少了推理时的计算开销。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20333v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Agent skills are commonly deployed as natural-language Markdown files that encode answer policies, evidence-use habits, and task procedures. These files are readable and portable, but they are consumed indirectly: for each task instance, a frozen language model must translate a long textual artifact into generation-time behavior. This paper asks whether a natural-language skill can instead initialize a compact continuous context object, refined by a trainable soft delta while the base model remains frozen. We propose SoftSkill, a frozen-backbone…
items.why_zh: SoftSkill通过将技能压缩为连续向量，实现了更高效的上下文适应，减少了推理时的计算开销。
items.why_en: SoftSkill enables more efficient contextual adaptation by compressing skills into continuous vectors, reducing inference-time computational overhead.

items.title_zh: 通过交互轨迹挖掘自动生成计算机使用智能体的SKILL.md
items.title_en: Automating SKILL.md Generation for Computer-Using Agents via Interaction Trajectory Mining
items.summary_zh: 显式技能库使计算机使用智能体更易于检查，但尚不清楚是否可以从交互数据中挖掘此类库以改进下游策略。本研究通过一个三阶段流程来探索这个问题：分割GUI轨迹、将片段聚类为候选技能、从生成的注释中训练技能感知策略。在源基准上，挖掘的聚类是可读的：八个聚类中有五个与InteraSkill Workflows标签的纯度至少达到0.95。然而，可读性并不保证下游性能提升，需要进一步研究如何有效利用这些技能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20363v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Explicit skill libraries make computer-using agents easier to inspect, but it remains unclear whether such libraries can be mined from interaction data in a way that improves downstream policies. We study this question through a three-stage pipeline that segments GUI trajectories, clusters segments into candidate skills, and trains a skill-aware policy from the resulting annotations. The mined clusters are readable on the source benchmark: five of eight clusters have at least 0.95 purity against InteraSkill Workflows labels. However, readability…
items.why_zh: 该研究探索了从交互数据中自动挖掘技能库的可行性，为计算机使用智能体的可解释性提供了新途径。
items.why_en: This research explores the feasibility of automatically mining skill libraries from interaction data, offering a new path for interpretability of computer-using agents.

items.title_zh: 基于注意力引导深度学习的可解释精子形态分类
items.title_en: Interpretable Sperm Morphology Classification via Attention-Guided Deep Learning
items.summary_zh: 男性不育是夫妻不育的主要原因，常与精子形态异常有关。虽然深度学习模型提供了自动化分析，但大多数缺乏可解释性，限制了其临床采用。本研究提出了一种注意力引导的深度学习框架用于精子形态分类。研究者将预训练的EfficientNet-B0与卷积块注意力模块（CBAM）相结合，聚焦于精子头部的关键区域，提高了准确性和可解释性。在SMIDS和HuSHem公共数据集上的评估表明，该模型在保持高精度的同时，通过注意力图提供了可视化的解释，有助于临床医生理解模型决策。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.20438v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Male infertility is a major cause of couple infertility, often linked to abnormal sperm morphology. While deep learning models offer automated analysis, most lack interpretability, limiting their clinical adoption. This study proposes an attention-guided deep learning framework for sperm morphology classification. We combine a pretrained EfficientNet-B0 with a Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) to focus on key areas of the sperm head, improving both accuracy and interpretability. Evaluated on the SMIDS and HuSHem public datasets, our mod…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过注意力机制增强了精子形态分类的可解释性，有助于推动深度学习在临床诊断中的应用。
items.why_en: This research enhances interpretability of sperm morphology classification via attention mechanisms, facilitating clinical adoption of deep learning.
